place: Laem Set, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Glass, Stone & Wood Beachfront Villa, Five Bedrooms
blurb: A contemporary five-bedroom beachfront villa a few steps from the sand on Koh Samui’s pristine Laem Set shore — a symphony of glass, stone and wood with a 13-metre saltwater infinity pool over the sea, a private tennis court and gym, and direct beach access in a neighbour-free setting. Fully staffed with a villa manager and chef.
detail:
Only a few steps from the beach on a quiet, pristine corner of the island, this is a stylish, contemporary beachfront retreat composed of glass, stone and wood that wraps you in warmth and light. Tucked away free of neighbours, with direct access to the sand, it comfortably hosts up to twelve guests across five bedrooms.

A lush landscape sets a private tennis court on one side and the villa on the other, with a gym and playroom — table tennis, board games and mahjong — for downtime. A central courtyard opens to a sprawling white-stone patio and a BBQ lounge, where a 13-metre saltwater infinity pool overlooks the sea, complete with a slide and a shallow zone for children, an outdoor jacuzzi, coconut-tree hammocks and parasol-shaded sun beds. Dining happens with a view, at a poolside sala or a breezy outdoor table.

Indoors and out connect seamlessly through fold-away glass panes, flooding the air-conditioned interiors with natural light; oversized sofas, a Smart TV and fast WiFi keep things easy. A state-of-the-art kitchen with a wine fridge serves a twelve-seat indoor dining table.

The master suite has a king bed and an en-suite with a Jacuzzi tub and ocean views; of the remaining bedrooms, two have twin beds and two have queens, each with an en-suite rain shower. Perfectly suited to families and groups of friends — and a striking setting for weddings of up to 150 — with dawn or sunset views depending on the season.

features.l: 13 m saltwater infinity pool · slide & kids zone
Master suite with Jacuzzi & ocean view
